ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classifiers" (
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier */,
  "classifier_name" TEXT /* Name of the classifier (e.g., LR, KNN, DT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classifier */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the classifier (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "library_used" TEXT /* Library used to implement the classifier */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., ACCURACY, G-MEAN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "higher_is_better" INTEGER /* Whether higher values are better for this metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oversampling_methods" (
  "oversampling_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oversampling method */,
  "oversampling_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the oversampling method (e.g., NO OVERSAMPLING, RANDOM OVERSAMPLING, SMOTE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the oversampling method */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the oversampling method (e.g., random, informed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oversampling_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classifier used in the experiment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used in the experiment */,
  "oversampling_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the oversampling method used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_oversampling_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("oversampling_method_id") REFERENCES oversampling_methods ("oversampling_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_classifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("classifier_id") REFERENCES classifiers ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that produced the result */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of the performance metric */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the performance metric */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifier_parameters" (
  "classifier_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier parameter */,
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classifier that uses the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifier_parameters_classifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("classifier_id") REFERENCES classifiers ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_parameters" (
  "metric_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric parameter */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that uses the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_parameters_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oversampling_method_parameters" (
  "oversampling_method_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oversampling method parameter */,
  "oversampling_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the oversampling method that uses the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oversampling_method_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oversampling_method_parameters_oversampling_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("oversampling_method_id") REFERENCES oversampling_methods ("oversampling_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_runs" (
  "experiment_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that was run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was run */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time the experiment was run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_values" (
  "result_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result value */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result that the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_values_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_standard_deviations" (
  "result_standard_deviation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result standard deviation */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result that the standard deviation belongs to */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard deviation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_standard_deviation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_standard_deviations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifier_results" (
  "classifier_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier result */,
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classifier that produced the result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifier_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifier_results_classifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("classifier_id") REFERENCES classifiers ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_results" (
  "metric_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric result */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that produced the result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oversampling_method_results" (
  "oversampling_method_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oversampling method result */,
  "oversampling_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the oversampling method that produced the result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oversampling_method_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oversampling_method_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oversampling_method_results_oversampling_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("oversampling_method_id") REFERENCES oversampling_methods ("oversampling_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_result_pairs" (
  "experiment_result_pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result pair */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that produced the results */,
  "result1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first result in the pair */,
  "result2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second result in the pair */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_result_pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_result_pairs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_result_pairs_result2_id FOREIGN KEY ("result2_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_result_pairs_result1_id FOREIGN KEY ("result1_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "experiment_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "experiment_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note for the experiment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
